[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

3★ Aru pick-up recruitment will begin on 11/16 (Tue).
It's your opportunity to recruit Aru at a higher rate than usual!

Pick-Up Recruitment Period: 11/16 (Tue) After Maintenance – 11/29 (Mon) 03:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance
